title: carex globulosa
intro: Carex globulosa, also known as globe sedge, is a type of perennial sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is a low-growing, rhizomatous plant native to North America, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including skin infections and respiratory issues. Globe sedge can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to take advantage of its health benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
